prestazioni: Crankshaft reinforcement with a billet steel 2.5L TFSI (DAZA/CZGB) stroker kit from 034 Motorsport, increasing displacement to 2.7L for improved torque response and durability under high boost

Garrett GTX3582R Gen II turbocharger with a custom 0.82 A/R turbine housing and 62mm compressor wheel, paired with a Precision Turbo wastegate (PT5864) for precise boost control up to 2.2 bar (32 psi) on E85

Full 3.5-inch titanium exhaust system from Akrapović with a dual-mode valve-controlled rear section, featuring a 304 stainless steel downpipe and 200-cell catalytic converters for emissions compliance without sacrificing flow
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit for the RSQ3 (8V facelift), including carbon fiber front fenders, rear quarter panels, and a ducktail spoiler with integrated third brake light
OEM+ RS3-style front bumper with a custom 3D-printed splitter from APR Performance, featuring an integrated air curtain and canards for improved aero efficiency at high speeds

Rotiform LAS-R 19x9.5 ET35 forged wheels in a satin black finish, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (265/30/19), paired with H&R RS14 coilovers with 30mm front and 25mm rear lowering springs for aggressive stance and track-ready handling
